subcodes.first_line: This is the Book, wherein there is no doubt, sent down in truth from the presence of One Who is All-Wise, All-Informed, guiding mankind unto nearness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذلک الکتاب لا ریب فیه تنزیل بالحق من لدن حکیم خبیرا و یهدی الناس الی جوار
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @suffering and imprisonment, @prayer for tests and difficulties, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @blind imitation [taqlid], @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
